title: Savory Russian Pilaf
description: A hearty, savory Russian-inspired pilaf dish made with mushrooms and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add mushroom stems and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add savory pilaf mix, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and serve.
